subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Blessed art thou, for thou hast clung to the Most Firm Handle and laid fast hold on the Sure Cord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق خوشا بحال تو که متشبث بعروه الوثقاای و متمسک بحبل المتین
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @firmness in the Covenant, @humility; meekness; lowliness
